title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
innovation_summary: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning.
